note: A genuine statutory BLOCK (Annex A6.5). STRICT (decision 2026-07-13): only a real block counts. 'statutory_consultee' REMOVED — 'must be consulted' is a consultation duty (duty_type=consultation), not a veto. Soft influence is not recorded at all. A veto is a DERIVED projection of the underlying power (see veto.schema derived_from_record_id). Active from Spiral 2.
